explanation: The provided C++ program reads integers from an input file named 'INPUT.TXT' and categorizes them into sums of even and odd indexed values. It determines which sum is less and makes a series of moves based on this comparison, using a hypothetical game structure implied by functions 'StartGame()', 'MyMove()', and 'YourMove()'. Finally, it writes the sums back to an output file 'OUTPUT.TXT', depending on which sum was larger.
name: 2009-06-27_ioi-1996
subject: IOI 1996
summary: This project analyzes a game involving selecting numbers from an input file and determining sums based on their positions. It outputs the sums of even and odd indexed numbers to an output file.
